arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou responds to backlash over second season trophy comments
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou has hit out at the backlash for stating that he always wins a trophy in his second season at a club, insisting it is just a "true" statement. I've answered a question, which is true, and [winning a trophy in the second year] has always happened.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou admits he will have 'failed' if Tottenham cannot end 16-year trophy drought this season
arts.sum: Postecoglou caused a stir after Sunday's 1-0 home defeat by Arsenal when responding to a question about remarks he made in pre-season when he said that 'usually in my second season I win things'.
